title: rubus fasciculatiformis
intro: Rubus fasciculatiformis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of shrub in the family Rosaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments. The health benefits of Rubus fasciculatiformis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Rubus fasciculatiformis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
